rule: use AuthMiddleware v2 with RBAC for all admin routes — never v1
context: AuthMiddleware v1 is deprecated and does not enforce RBAC. All admin routes must migrate to AuthMiddleware v2 which includes role-based access control. The v1 middleware only checked token validity, not role permissions. Migration: replace `auth.v1()` with `auth.v2({ roles: ['admin'] })` in route definitions.
